findings.description: The en translation renders the answer choice as '(e)' (lowercase letter in parentheses). Stage 7 normalisation guidance specifies A/B/C/D. The jp correctly retains 'エ' (katakana choice marker). Low impact as the figure is explanatory rather than a quiz stem.

reviewer_notes: Page content is well-represented. All four major content blocks — definition of man-hours, the two section headings, the profit-per-man-hour calculation, and the worked-solution figure — are present and accurate. The sole finding is a minor en choice-marker rendering issue in the figure caption that does not affect comprehension.
